title: Contact
content:
Contact The LounGenie Team

Find out what your property can earn.

Tell us about your cabanas, daybeds, or premium seating footprint and we will map where the LounGenie fits, what rollout looks like, and where new poolside revenue can come from.

Zero Upfront Cost Installed By PoolSafe Customized To Match Your Property
What you get on the first callA practical discussion about layout, guest flow, installation, and revenue upside.
Who it is forHotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and aquatic venues with premium seating.

1. Layout Review

We assess your premium seating footprint.

We look at cabanas, daybeds, clamshells, and reserved seating areas to identify where the LounGenie drives the most guest value and revenue impact.

2. Revenue Projection

You get a property-specific commercial view.

We walk through deployment scale, seating mix, guest behavior, and where the LounGenie can support higher dwell time and stronger food and beverage conversion.

3. Rollout Plan

PoolSafe handles installation and service.

No wiring, no permits, no upfront capital. We coordinate installation, branding, and ongoing service so your team can stay focused on operations.

Request Demo

Start the conversation.

Complete the form and our team will respond within one business day with a tailored revenue projection for your property.

If the form does not load, email info@poolsafeinc.com.

Why operators reach out

They want premium seating to perform like premium seating.

The LounGenie helps properties turn passive seat inventory into a stronger guest-experience product with better commercial performance attached to it.

Direct Contact

906 Magnetic Drive, North York, ON M3J 2C4, Canada

416-630-2444
info@poolsafeinc.com

Partner Results

“The Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience as well, improving service response times. It has been very convenient for both our staff and our guests.”

Kamiya Woodard

Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott
